## Reality note (2026-05-27)

The core migration was performed **by hand**: the three `.claude-plugin/*.json` manifests were authored directly, every tool was moved `extensions/<ext>/tools/<tool>/` тЖТ `tools/<tool>/`, and `src/` + `extensions/` + `dist/` + `bin` were deleted. There is **no build aggregator** (`buildCanonicalPlugin()` / `npm run build:plugin` never existed). ManifestтЖФdisk sync is guarded by a **drift test**, not a build step. Tasks below reflect what is DONE (the hand migration) vs what REMAINS to make PR #24 merge-ready, per the readiness review (60 commits behind main, e2e never run, tests don't cover the new layout, obsolete rules + dead references).

## Already done тАФ core migration (hand-performed, not tracked as open tasks)

- `.claude-plugin/{plugin,marketplace,hooks}.json` authored by hand тАФ valid; 24 hook commands across 5 events (@feature1, @feature2, @feature9).
- Every `extensions/<ext>/tools/<tool>/` moved тЖТ top-level `tools/<tool>/`.
- `src/installer`, `src/updater`, `extensions/`, `dist/`, `bin/cli` deleted.
- `pomogator-doctor` converted to canonical skill `.claude/skills/pomogator-doctor/`.
- Cursor support removed тАФ no `src/installer/cursor.ts`; package.json metadata pruned (@feature8) тАФ residue refs tracked in Phase 5.
- v1тЖТv2 migration script `tools/migrate-v1-to-v2/migrate-v1-to-v2.ts` тАФ project+global cleanup, removes old hooks/gitignore-block/managed files, backs up user mods, idempotent via `.migrated-to-v2`, `--dry-run` (@feature7).
- README.md + CLAUDE.md updated to canonical layout.
